testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Help Modal help button exists in grid area
testcase.classname: help button exists in grid area

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Help Modal clicking help button opens help overlay
testcase.classname: clicking help button opens help overlay

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Help Modal help overlay has keyboard shortcut table
testcase.classname: help overlay has keyboard shortcut table

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Help Modal help overlay has key labels with kg-help-key class
testcase.classname: help overlay has key labels with kg-help-key class

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Help Modal help overlay has close button
OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Help Modal close button dismisses help overlay
OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Help Modal Escape key closes help overlay
OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Help Modal backdrop click dismisses help overlay
OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Help Modal help overlay has role=dialog and aria-modal
testcase.classname: help overlay has role=dialog and aria-modal

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid ARIA Live Region aria live region exists in DOM after grid loads
testcase.classname: aria live region exists in DOM after grid loads

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Navigation grid cells have tabindex attribute set
testcase.classname: grid cells have tabindex attribute set

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Navigation grid cells have role=gridcell
OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Navigation grid table has role=grid
OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Navigation cell gets kg-focused class on focus
testcase.classname: cell gets kg-focused class on focus

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Navigation arrow key moves kg-focused to next row
testcase.classname: arrow key moves kg-focused to next row

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Navigation Ctrl+A selects all cells with kg-selected class
testcase.classname: Ctrl+A selects all cells with kg-selected class

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Navigation Ctrl+F focuses search input
OpenSparrow – Grid Keyboard Navigation search highlights cells with kg-search-match when term matches
testcase.classname: search highlights cells with kg-search-match when term matches

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Nav-Mode keyboard navigation does not leave cell in editing state
testcase.classname: keyboard navigation does not leave cell in editing state
